title: Exact Matrix Invariant And Characteristic Polynomial Checks

solver_reuse.target: matrix invariant bad characteristic-polynomial QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact characteristic-polynomial replay computes the witness-root value 0, but the malformed row claims the same value is 2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional fixed matrix-invariant rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep higher-dimensional determinant algorithms, algebraic multiplicity theorems, and numerical eigenvalue algorithms in Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed 2x2 trace, determinant, characteristic-polynomial, and Cayley-Hamilton claims as deterministic exact-rational obligations.
Replay roots and interval eigenvalue bounds through Axeyum model evaluation over finite matrices and fixed-degree polynomials.
Route false fixed characteristic-polynomial claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence once exact replay computes the conflicting witness-root value.
Generalize to higher-dimensional determinant/characteristic-polynomial computation only after a reusable matrix-invariant utility is warranted.
Keep general spectral theorems, algebraic multiplicity theorems, and numerical eigenvalue algorithms marked Lean/numerical horizon.
